title: Secondo uno studio dell'università di Urbino l'algoritmo di Facebook ora punisce la politica ufficiale e premia gli estremisti antieuropei. Pd e FdI verso una legge bipartisan sulle piattaforme
snippet: This article from Open.online, dated January 7, 2026, highlights a research study led by Professor Fabio Giglietto of the University of Urbino, demonstrating that Facebook's algorithms penalize official political content while boosting anti-European extremists.
description: This Open.online article, dated January 7, 2026, reports on a study led by Professor Fabio Giglietto from the University of Urbino, demonstrating how Facebook's algorithms favor extremist content over official political discourse. The research aligns with his expertise in social media analysis and information disorder.

title: Più visibilità agli estremisti che ai parlamentari, l'impatto del “filtro” di Meta sulle elezioni
snippet: Published on January 7, 2026, this article in Corriere della Sera discusses a study by Professor Giglietto from the University of Urbino, illustrating how Meta's algorithms prioritize extremist content over that of elected officials, affecting election outcomes.
description: An article in Corriere della Sera discusses a study by Professor Giglietto from the University of Urbino, illustrating how Meta's algorithms prioritize extremist content over that of elected officials, affecting election outcomes.

description: The article outlines the roadmap for the 'Complexity Science for Italy' initiative (CS2Italy 2026) and lists Fabio Giglietto from the University of Urbino as a tentative member of its Steering Committee.
